rules.desc: Consistent art style across all assets — no style drift between assets
rules.rationale_pass: Art style consistent with project bible (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Style drifts from project bible — wrong rendering approach (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Clear composition and framing appropriate to lane — subject fills frame, readable staging
rules.rationale_pass: Composition clear — subject properly framed and staged (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Composition fails — subject poorly framed or cluttered (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Silhouette readable at gameplay scale — identifiable at target resolution
rules.rationale_fail: Silhouette unreadable at gameplay scale — details merge or vanish (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Color harmony within project palette — correct hue relationships and saturation level
rules.rationale_pass: Palette harmonious and within project range (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Palette dissonant or outside project range (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Material surfaces read correctly — metal reads as metal, cloth as cloth, no ambiguous surfaces
rules.rationale_fail: Materials ambiguous — surfaces don't read as ${groupMaterial} (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Style-group differentiation — assets from different groups look visually distinct
rules.rationale_pass: Style group reads clearly — distinct from other groups (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Style group unreadable — could belong to any group (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Wear and aging appropriate to context — not too clean, not over-damaged
Consistent lighting direction and mood across assets — no conflicting light sources
rules.rationale_pass: Lighting consistent — direction and mood match project standard (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Lighting inconsistent — wrong direction or mood (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: No generic or stock-art appearance — assets must feel authored, not asset-store pulls
rules.rationale_fail: Asset reads as generic stock art — no project identity (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Scale reference present or implied — objects read at correct relative size
rules.rationale_pass: Scale reads correctly — objects at proper relative size (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Scale ambiguous — objects don't read at correct size (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Shape language matches style group — geometry and proportions follow group vocabulary
rules.rationale_fail: Shape language violates group vocabulary — wrong geometry (${scorePct}%)

rules.desc: Detail density appropriate to asset importance and screen size — hero assets get more detail
rules.rationale_pass: Detail density appropriate for asset role (${scorePct}%)
rules.rationale_fail: Detail density wrong — over-detailed background or under-detailed hero (${scorePct}%)
